message:
Add crate slug normalization for scaffold connector names

Introduces normalize_crate_slug() to safely convert arbitrary connector
short names into valid crate and directory names:

- Converts to lowercase
- Replaces non-alphanumeric characters with dashes
- Collapses consecutive dashes
- Trims leading/trailing dashes

Updates scaffold_connector() and generate_files() to:
- Use normalized crate_slug for paths and crate names
- Derive crate_ident (underscore version) for Rust code references
- Pass crate_ident to generate_main_rs() and generate_unit_tests_rs()
- Pass crate_name to generate_e2e_tests_rs() for proper imports

This allows connector IDs like "fcp.my-cool.service" to produce valid
crate names like "fcp-my-cool-service" and paths like "connectors/my-cool-service".

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
